crime.value: Murder by hanging with additional mutilation - victim found hanged with slit wrists and 'KILLER' carved in forehead
crime.quote: the man hanging from the ceiling in the centre of the room...six spiky letters carved in his forehead: KILLER

victim.value: Middle-aged man who was identified as one of Stangerson's suspects, possibly a killer himself targeted for vigilante justice
victim.quote: he was Stangerson's second suspect, the one in the photograph he showed me

culprit_and_motive.value: Vigilante killer targeting suspected criminals, motive appears to be dispensing justice to those who escaped it
culprit_and_motive.quote: You think we've got a vigilante running around?

resolution.value: Case handed over to Scotland Yard as investigators declare themselves out of their depth
resolution.quote: Scotland Yard should take it further now...this case is closed

investigator.value: Grimshaw and Wesley Mortimer, amateur detective duo who examine crime scenes and evidence
investigator.quote: Don't touch it!...Evidence could be lost

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool: Stangerson's second suspect (murdered vigilante victim), implied vigilante killer, missing Henry Herman
suspect_architecture.quote: this man...he was Stangerson's second suspect, the one in the photograph he showed me

red_herring.value: Vigilante justice misdirection - 'KILLER' carved in forehead suggests victim deserved death, obscuring true motive
red_herring.quote: maybe he deserved this. 'You think we've got a vigilante running around?'

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence described to reader: skin in kettle, magnifying glass analysis, crime scene details, carved forehead
clue_fairness.quote: Grimshaw observed the small bubbling square of boiled skin he'd poured onto the plate

social_world.value: Detective partnership with Scotland Yard institutional hierarchy - cases handed off when 'out of depth'
social_world.quote: Scotland Yard should take it further now...for us, Wesley, this case is closed

reveal_mechanic.value: Forensic analysis of boiled skin tissue and magnifying glass examination to identify victim Henry Herman
reveal_mechanic.quote: Grimshaw observed the small bubbling square of boiled skin he'd poured onto the plate

investigator_wound.value: Grimshaw's recognition of being fictional and out of depth - meta-awareness of limitations as detective characters
investigator_wound.quote: Are we fiction? I forget...it's not like it's real, anyway

_meta.title: ebook chris harris grimshaw amp mortimer the case book
